## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? 1-3 bullet points. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change (no new feature, no bug fix)
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance (deps, config, tooling)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Types check (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] New code has tests (or explain why not)

### Documentation (check all that apply)

- [ ] No docs needed — change is internal/trivial
- [ ] Updated `docs/architecture.md` (API endpoints, data flows)
- [ ] Updated `docs/development.md` (env vars, commands, setup)
- [ ] Updated `docs/deployment.md` (deploy steps, config)
- [ ] Updated `docs/testing.md` (test patterns, coverage)
- [ ] Updated `docs/standards.md` (new conventions)
- [ ] Updated `AGENTS.md` (AI-relevant changes)
- [ ] Added ADR in `docs/adr/` (architectural decision)

### Security (required for auth/payment/storage changes)

- [ ] No auth/payment/storage code touched
- [ ] Reviewed for token handling, input validation, logging of PII
- [ ] Second reviewer assigned for security-sensitive code
